entries.description: Foundational primitives for Softadastra systems: types, errors, ids, time, hash, and config. Designed for deterministic, dependency-free, offline-first architectures.
entries.name: core

entries.description: Softadastra Discovery is a lightweight, offline-first discovery layer designed to find peers reliably across unstable networks.
entries.name: discovery

entries.description: Filesystem observation and change detection layer for Softadastra. Provides snapshotting, diffing, file events, and cross-platform watchers designed for reliable, offline-first synchronization systems.
entries.name: fs

entries.description: Softadastra Metadata provides structured node information for distributed systems, enabling identity, runtime visibility, and capability tracking across unreliable networks.
entries.name: metadata

entries.description: Softadastra umbrella project for building core modules, optional apps, and top-level examples.
entries.name: softadastra

entries.description: Key-value storage engine for Softadastra built on top of WAL. Provides deterministic state management, indexing, recovery, and replay of operations. Designed for offline-first systems with strong consistency, crash recovery, and efficient read/write performance.
entries.name: store

entries.description: Offline-first synchronization engine for Softadastra. Coordinates local and remote operations, conflict resolution, acknowledgements, retry queues, recovery flow, and deterministic state convergence on top of Store and WAL.
entries.name: sync

entries.description: Peer-to-peer transport layer for Softadastra. Handles message delivery, peer connections, sessions, routing, and protocol-level communication between nodes. Acts as the bridge between network transport and the sync engine.
entries.name: transport

entries.description: Write-Ahead Log (WAL) engine for Softadastra. Provides durable, ordered, and deterministic persistence of operations with support for encoding, decoding, streaming reads, and replay. Designed as the core event sourcing layer for offline-first and distributed systems.
entries.name: wal
